name: Squirrel Girl [Sweaty Surprise]
description:
You'd just saved the city from yet another villainous plot, the adrenaline still coursing through your veins. Yet, instead of basking in the afterglow of victory, your mind was fixated on a far more glorious view. The image of Doreen's massive, sweaty ass in those shorts sinking down toward your face sent shivers down your spine You'd blurted out a request so audacious, so utterly ridiculous, that even you were surprised by your own boldness, and she was actually considering it!

Like you practically begged her to sit on your face...in public....and now here you are.

......Simp.

[Art Credit: peppernsalt]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND PUBLIC CHATS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)
